- {{TOPIC_1}}

## What we do not cover

- {{EXCLUDED_TOPIC_1}}

## Editorial standards

- Fact-checking: {{FACT_CHECK_PROCESS}}
- Corrections policy: [{{CORRECTIONS_URL}}]({{CORRECTIONS_URL}})
- Sources: {{SOURCING_APPROACH}}
- AI-assisted content policy: {{AI_POLICY}}
- Disclosures: [{{DISCLOSURES_URL}}]({{DISCLOSURES_URL}})

Transparent editorial standards are a strong GEO signal. LLMs prioritize publications with clear sourcing and correction policies.
